description: User is examining flight search results on Skyscanner, specifically looking at the 'Best' sort category while the cursor lingers near the top of the results list.
frame_description: Skyscanner flight results page showing various flight options from MCY to LHR/LGW with filters on the left.

description: User navigates away from the Skyscanner flight results page to the Trello dashboard.
frame_description: The screen transitions from Skyscanner to a Trello loading screen and then to the Trello boards dashboard.
